description_short: Made with GOLS Certified 100% Natural Latex, this luxurious mattress gives breathable & responsive comfort with 7-zone body support.

construction_layers.name: Top Layer
construction_layers.notes: GOLS Certified with Pinhole Tech for breathability.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle, tumble dry low.

proprietary_tech.name: Pinhole Technology
proprietary_tech.description: Enhances airflow and reduces heat retention.

proprietary_tech.name: CoolTEC™ Fabric
proprietary_tech.description: Keeps the mattress up to 4°C cooler.

proprietary_tech.name: 7-Zone DeepTouch™ Pressure Tech
proprietary_tech.description: Provides targeted support for different body parts.

faq_specs.question: What materials are used in this mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Made with GOLS Certified 100% Natural Latex and high-density foam.

faq_specs.question: What is the thickness of the Ultima Natural Latex Mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Available in two thickness options: 20.32 cm (8 inches) and 25.4 cm (10 inches).

faq_specs.question: What is the weight capacity of this mattress?
faq_specs.answer: The mattress can support a weight capacity of up to 250 kg.

faq_specs.question: How long is the warranty on the Ultima Natural Latex Mattress?

notes_observed: 8" SKU dimensions only — 10" SKU exists per FAQ but not extracted.
